arts.ttl: 'I think': David Seaman has made his prediction for Chelsea vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea kickstart a hectic December tomorrow afternoon by hosting Aston Villa in the Premier League. Chelsea will play nine games across all competitions in December,...

arts.ttl: Unai Emery fires Aston Villa demand ahead of Chelsea as 'concern' clear
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has expressed his concern over his team's inability to channel their frustration effectively after a seven-match winless streak. "When we are being very, very demanding and trying to keep our high level of our consistency and sometimes not getting it, the frustration we have to manage."

arts.ttl: Aston Villa to take transfer decision on forward who can't stop scoring
arts.sum: Aston Villa's Louie Barry is courting interest from Championship clubs ahead of the January transfer window. The forward has been in sensational form out on loan at Stockport County in League One this season and Villa will have a decision to make ahead of the upcoming window with a recall on the cards.

arts.ttl: Chelsea braced for January attack as 'several clubs knock on door'
arts.sum: 'Several clubs' have already 'knocked on the door' for Chelsea defender Benoit Badiashile ahead of January, according to French media. With another January window approaching and Badiashile still struggling for Premier League minutes, clubs are once more 'knocking on the door.'

arts.ttl: Chelsea star DELETES club from his social media account after struggling for game time during loan spell away from Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: The 20-year-old joined the Blues in the summer of 2023 from Rennes for a fee rising to £23.1million, with the midfielder a highly-rated France youth international.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Aston Villa predictions: Palmer can inspire Blues once again
arts.sum: Chelsea play host to Aston Villa in the Premier League on Sunday and Aaron Rogan is backing Cole Palmer to have a big say on the match for the Blues.

arts.ttl: Chelsea selection debate rages as Enzo Maresca faces questions ahead of Aston Villa
arts.sum: Bobby's Chelsea XI : Jorgensen; Gusto, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Fernandez, Caicedo; Madueke, Palmer, Neto; Jackson. Chelsea are riding high on a four-match unbeaten streak in the Premier League and assistant coach Enzo Maresca is intent on extending that run when the Blues host Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge on Sunday.

Fixtures Chelsea Vs. Aston Villa - Sun, Dec 1st 2024, 13:30 Aston Villa tied up preparations for this weekend's Premier League trip to Chelsea, with a final training session at Bodymoor Heath on Saturday morning. Unai Emery's side will travel to West London looking to return to winning ways, after being held to a goalless draw at home to Juventus in the Champions League in midweek. The Villans were put through their paces at their B78 training base ahead of the clash, and you can view a gallery of images from training below...

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Stan Collymore says Chelsea the worst in the Premier League for one thing as he makes Aston Villa prediction
arts.sum: Stan Collymore has made his prediction ahead of Sunday’s clash between Chelsea and Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea host domestic rivals Villa this weekend...
